pr.title: Rename gm_17C0 to gmregclear based on assert
pr.author: PsiLupan

summary: PR 2222 renames the game-mode translation unit and header from gm_17C0 to gmregclear, updates build/split metadata, updates includes in dependent files, and adjusts one source comment. The title says the rename is based on an assert, but the loaded slice does not include the assert text or location.

key_files.role: Renamed source file from src/melee/gm/gm_17C0.c; local include changed from gm_17C0.h to gmregclear.h.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: rename from src/melee/gm/gm_17C0.c to src/melee/gm/gmregclear.c

key_files.role: Renamed header from src/melee/gm/gm_17C0.h; include guard updated to MELEE_gmregclear_H.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: rename from src/melee/gm/gm_17C0.h to src/melee/gm/gmregclear.h
raw_diff: gmregclear.h hunk changes MELEE_GM_17C0_H to MELEE_gmregclear_H

key_files.role: Split entry renamed from melee/gm/gm_17C0.c to melee/gm/gmregclear.c while preserving text/rodata/data ranges.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: config/GALE01/splits.txt changes melee/gm/gm_17C0.c to melee/gm/gmregclear.c

key_files.role: Build object list renamed from melee/gm/gm_17C0.c to melee/gm/gmregclear.c; object remains NonMatching.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: configure.py MatchingFor object changes Object(NonMatching, "melee/gm/gm_17C0.c") to Object(NonMatching, "melee/gm/gmregclear.c")

key_files.role: Dependent header includes updated from gm_17C0.h to gmregclear.h in two include locations.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gm_1601.h changes two #include <melee/gm/gm_17C0.h> lines to #include <melee/gm/gmregclear.h>

key_files.role: Aggregate game-mode export header updated to export gmregclear.h instead of gm_17C0.h; include alignment also changed.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gm_unsplit.h spacing aligned across include list

key_files.role: Include dependency updated from gm/gm_17C0.h to gm/gmregclear.h.
Comment updated to refer to gmregclear.c instead of gm_17C0.c.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbbgflash.c comment changes gm_17C0.c to gmregclear.c

key_files.role: Include dependency updated from gm/gm_17C0.h to gm/gmregclear.h.

what_changed: Renamed the game-mode source path src/melee/gm/gm_17C0.c to src/melee/gm/gmregclear.c.
Renamed the corresponding header path src/melee/gm/gm_17C0.h to src/melee/gm/gmregclear.h.
Updated split metadata in config/GALE01/splits.txt from melee/gm/gm_17C0.c to melee/gm/gmregclear.c without changing the shown address ranges.
Updated configure.py so the NonMatching object path uses melee/gm/gmregclear.c.
Updated dependent includes in gm_1601.h, gm_unsplit.h, grcorneria.c, and vi0401.c.
Updated a lbbgflash.c documentation comment from gm_17C0.c to gmregclear.c.
smart_moves: The rename was propagated through build metadata, split metadata, aggregate headers, dependent includes, and documentation text rather than only renaming the source file.
The split entry preserved the existing section address ranges while changing only the translation-unit path name.
The build configuration preserved the object status as NonMatching while updating the source path.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When renaming an address-style translation unit to a semantic name, update the source/header paths, build object list, split metadata, aggregate export header, dependent includes, and references in comments together.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gm_1601.h, gm_unsplit.h, grcorneria.c, vi0401.c include updates

decomp_lessons.lesson: A PR title can cite an assert as naming evidence, but intake should not treat the asserted name as independently verified unless the assert text or location is present in the loaded evidence.
evidence_refs: metadata_json: title is "Rename gm_17C0 to gmregclear based on assert"
